OmniScript.description: Let payors capture the patient's latest benefits details through a series of assessment questions and a summary view.
OmniScript.name: Payor Benefits Assessment

childElements.name: LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefit_BenefitNotes
LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefit_FinalCoverageStatusCodeId
LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItem_IsInPlanNetwork

LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_CoInsurance

omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "$standardLabel.LSCPayorAssessment.Save", "remoteClass" : "discoveryfrmwrk.StoreResponses", "remoteMethod" : "invokeMethod", "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "ResponseContextId" : "%cpeId%" }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Done", "failureNextLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.GoBack", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "useContinuation" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: SetFinalCoverageStatusCode
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "", "elementValueMap" : { "finalCoverageStatusCodeId" : "%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefit_FinalCoverageStatusCodeId%" }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SetValues1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "$standardLabel.LSCPayorAssessment.SetValues1", "elementValueMap" : { "showDeductibles" : "=IF(%childData:deductibles% = \"\" || %childData:deductibles% = null,true,false)", "showCoPay" : "=IF(%childData:copay% = \"\" || %childData:copay% = null,true,false)", "showCoInsurance" : "=IF(%childData:coinsurance% = \"\" || %childData:coinsurance% = null,true,false)", "showDeductiblesApplied" : "=IF(%childData:deductiblesapplied% = \"\" || %childData:deductiblesapplied% = null,true,false)", "showDeductiblesMet" : "=IF(%childData:deductiblesmet% = \"\" || %childData:deductiblesmet% = null,true,false)", "showOOPMax" : "=IF(%childData:oopmax% = \"\" || %childData:oopmax% = null,true,false)", "showOOPMaxMet" : "=IF(%childData:oopmaxmet% = \"\" || %childData:oopmaxmet% = null,true,false)", "showOOPApplied" : "=IF(%childData:outofpocketapplied% = \"\" || %childData:outofpocketapplied% = null,true,false)", "showLTM" : "=IF(%childData:ltm% = \"\" || %childData:ltm% = null,true,false)", "showInfusionCoinsurance" : "=IF(%childData:infusioncoinsurance% = \"\" || %childData:infusioncoinsurance% = null,true,false)", "showInfusionCopay" : "=IF(%childData:infusioncopay% = \"\" || %childData:infusioncopay% = null,true,false)", "showRemainingLTM" : "=IF(%childData:remainingltm% = \"\" || %childData:remainingltm% = null,true,false)", "showTotal" : "=IF(%childData:total% = \"\" || %childData:total% = null,true,false)", "showFinalCoverageStatusCode" : "=IF(%childData:FinalCoverageStatusCode% = \"\" || %childData:FinalCoverageStatusCode% = null,true,false)", "showIsPreauthorizationRequired" : "=IF(%childData:IsPreauthorizationRequired% = \"false\",true,false)", "showNotes" : "=IF(%childData:Notes% = \"\" || %childData:Notes% = null,true,false)", "showNetworkType" : "=IF(%childData:IsInPlanNetwork__std% = \"false\" && %childData:OutofNetworkCoverage__std% = \"\" || %childData:IsInPlanNetwork__std% = \"false\" && %childData:OutofNetworkCoverage__std% = null,true,false)", "CoPay" : "%parentData:copay%", "CoInsurance" : "%parentData:coinsurance%", "Deductibles" : "%parentData:deductibles%", "DeductiblesApplied" : "%parentData:deductiblesapplied%", "DeductiblesMet" : "%parentData:deductiblesmet%", "OOPMax" : "%parentData:oopmax%", "OOPMaxMet" : "%parentData:oopmaxmet%", "OOPApplied" : "%parentData:outofpocketapplied%", "LTM" : "%parentData:ltm%", "InfusionCoinsurance" : "%parentData:infusioncoinsurance%", "InfusionCopay" : "%parentData:infusioncopay%", "RemainingLTM" : "%parentData.remainingltm%", "Total" : "%parentData:total%", "LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefit_FinalCoverageStatusCodeId" : "%parentData:FinalCoverageStatusCode%", "LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItem_IsPreauthorizationRequired" : "=IF(%parentData:IsPreauthorizationRequired% = \"true\",\"yes\",\"no\")", "LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefit_BenefitNotes" : "%parentData:Notes%", "LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItem_IsInPlanNetwork" : "=IF(%parentData:IsInPlanNetwork__std% = \"true\" && %parentData:InNetworkCoverage__std% = \"In Network\",\"In\",IF(%parentData:IsInPlanNetwork__std% = \"false\" && %parentData:OutofNetworkCoverage__std% = \"Out of Network\",\"Out\", \"NA\"))", "cbvrDataFetchSuccessful" : "%cbvrDataFetchSuccessful%" }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SetValues2
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "$standardLabel.LSCPayorAssessment.SetValues2", "elementValueMap" : { "CopaySummary" : "=IF(%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_CoPay%,'$'+%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_CoPay%,'')", "CoInsuranceSummary" : "=IF(%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_CoInsurance%,'$'+%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_CoInsurance%,'')", "DeductiblesSummary" : "=IF(%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_Deductibles%,'$'+%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_Deductibles%,'')", "DeductiblesAppliedSummary" : "=IF(%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_DeductiblesApplied%,'$'+%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_DeductiblesApplied%,'')", "DeductiblesMetSummary" : "=IF(%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_DeductiblesMet%,'$'+%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_DeductiblesMet%,'')", "OOPMaxSummary" : "=IF(%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_OopMax%,'$'+%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_OopMax%,'')", "OOPMaxMetSummary" : "=IF(%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_OopMaxMet%,'$'+%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_OopMaxMet%,'')", "OOPAppliedSummary" : "=IF(%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_OutOfPocketApplied%,'$'+%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_OutOfPocketApplied%,'')", "LTMSummary" : "=IF(%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_Ltm%,'$'+%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_Ltm%,'')", "InfusionCopaySummary" : "=IF(%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_InfusionCoPay%,'$'+%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_InfusionCoPay%,'')", "InfusionCoinsuranceSummary" : "=IF(%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_InfusionCoInsurance%,'$'+%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_InfusionCoInsurance%,'')", "RemainingLTMSummary" : "=IF(%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_RemainingLtm%,'$'+%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_RemainingLtm%,'')", "TotalSummary" : "=IF(%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_Total%,'$'+%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItemLimit_Total%,'')", "CoverageStatusSummary" : "%finalCoverageStatusCodeName%", "NetworkTypeSummary" : "%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItem_IsInPlanNetwork%", "PreauthorizationSummary" : "%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefitItem_IsPreauthorizationRequired%", "NotesSummary" : "%LSC_BV_v2_CoverageBenefit_BenefitNotes%" }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SetValuesURL
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "$standardLabel.LSCPayorAssessment.SetValues3", "elementValueMap" : { "homeUrlPath" : "=%homeUrl%+'?signature='+%signature%", "RequestSent" : true }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: Step1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "$standardLabel.LSCPayorAssessment.BenefitDetails", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "", "previousWidth" : "0", "nextLabel" : "", "nextWidth" : "0", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "", "saveChangesLabel" : "Save Changes", "saveMessage" : "", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "<>", "field" : "cbvrDataFetchSuccessful" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : false, "allowSaveChanges" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "ariaLevel" : 2, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: CustomLWCNoSummary
LineBreak36

omniProcessElements.name: Summary
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "$standardLabel.LSCPayorAssessment.Summary", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.Submit", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.SaveForLater", "saveMessage" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmniScriptCommon.SaveMessage", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "=", "field" : "cbvrDataFetchSuccessful" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
